final:
module RefModule (
    input J,
    input K,
    input CLK,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        case ({J, K})
            2'b00: Q <= Q;        // No change
            2'b01: Q <= 0;        // Reset
            2'b10: Q <= 1;        // Set
            2'b11: Q <= ~Q;       // Toggle
        endcase
    end
endmodule
